ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily report */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date on which the report was filed */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code as per ISO standards */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases up to the given date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the given date */,
  "cumulative_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths up to the given date */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the report (e.g., government, health organization) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_reports_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Full name of the country */,
  "who_region" TEXT /* WHO region to which the country belongs */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language(s) of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_who_region FOREIGN KEY ("who_region") REFERENCES who_regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, researcher, public) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user represents */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the user accessed the platform */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "pages_visited" TEXT /* Pages visited by the user during the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily report */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date on which the report was originally filed */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code as per ISO standards */,
  "new_cases" INTEGER /* Number of new cases reported on the given date */,
  "cumulative_cases" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of cases up to the given date */,
  "new_deaths" INTEGER /* Number of new deaths reported on the given date */,
  "cumulative_deaths" INTEGER /* Cumulative number of deaths up to the given date */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was updated */,
  "update_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_history_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_history_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_history_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "who_regions" (
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code for the WHO region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the WHO region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the WHO region */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Headquarters location of the WHO region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Country code as per ISO standards */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for the analytics period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the analytics period */,
  "average_new_cases" REAL /* Average number of new cases per day during the period */,
  "average_new_deaths" REAL /* Average number of new deaths per day during the period */,
  "trend" TEXT /* Trend of cases/deaths (e.g., increasing, decreasing, stable) */,
  "forecast" TEXT /* Forecasted trend based on historical data */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval for the forecast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the daily report */,
  "recipient_organization" TEXT /* Name of the organization receiving the data */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was shared */,
  "sharing_type" TEXT /* Type of data sharing (e.g., full report, summary) */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who shared the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES daily_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback or suggestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date when the log entry was created */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., error, info, warning) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Text of the log message */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
